title: ononis pusilla f. suborbicularis
intro: Ononis pusilla f. suborbicularis, also known as the small restharrow or dwarf restharrow, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ononis pusilla f. suborbicularis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb for treating various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal issues.
